live_store_metadata.short_description: Create funny AR videos with AR Dogy Filter, interactive 3D characters, trending filter effects, and weird face filters.

full_description_digest.one_sentence_summary: A playful AR camera app for creating short videos with AR Dogy characters, interactive 3D characters, dance scenes, character controls, and weird/funny face effects.
description_sections: Funny Face Filters and Weird Effects
Why Users Enjoy AR Filter: FYP Dogy Filter
main_feature_claims: Place AR Dogy characters into the real environment
Make characters run, jump, and move
Record dance videos with animated AR characters
Try weird/funny face filters and face transformations
Create reaction clips and meme-style content
Use an easy camera flow for playful videos
how_to_use_flow: Open the camera and choose an AR filter
Place the AR character in the real environment and adjust the scene
Control the character, dance with it, or try funny face effects

corrected_positioning.primary_positioning: AR camera app for funny short videos with AR Dogy characters and interactive 3D AR effects.
secondary_positioning: Funny face filter app for weird transformations and meme-style reaction clips
3D AR character app for playful dance and movement scenes
Trend-inspired short video camera effect app
not_the_right_positioning: Not a broad AR platform for professional creators
strongest_differentiators: Interactive 3D AR characters placed in the real environment
Character controls such as running, jumping, and moving while recording
Dance-video use case with AR characters
Combination of AR character effects and weird face filters in one app

core_user_jobs: I want to make funny short videos quickly
I want a dog/dogy AR effect for social content
I want to place a 3D character into my camera scene
I want to control a character while recording
I want weird face filters for joke, reaction, or meme videos
I want a playful effect that feels trend/FYP-inspired
likely_audience: Gen Z and young casual users
Users looking for funny camera effects
Users searching for dog/puppy/dogy filter experiences
Users interested in dance, trend, or challenge-style clips

avoid_or_use_carefully.note: Use only as user-intent context or sharing behavior. Avoid implying affiliation.
Do not position the app as Snapchat or an official Snapchat lens/filter source.
Use carefully as a sharing context only.
Avoid exaggerated ranking claims in metadata.
Use only if accurate for the specific feature and monetization model.

competitor_strategy.previous_profile_issue: Snapchat, TikTok, and Instagram are broad platform references, not direct ASO competitors for this niche app.

recommended_competitor_types.description: Apps ranking around funny face filters, live face camera, face warp, time warp, dog/puppy face filters, and camera effects.
Apps with animated 3D characters, AR characters, AR camera effects, or character-in-real-world camera experiences.
Apps from the same developer that may share audience and keywords, useful for cannibalization and portfolio keyword mapping.
Use Snapchat/TikTok/Instagram only as inspiration or behavior context, not as direct competitor rows.

suggested_competitors.title: AR Dog Filter: Dog Doin
suggested_competitors.why_relevant: Virtual AR dog placement, control character actions, record funny short videos for social sharing.
suggested_competitors.short_description: Spawn a funny 3D AR dog in your room, control its actions, and record hilarious prank videos.
suggested_competitors.desc200: AR Dog Filter: Dog Doin is an entertainment app that allows you to bring a virtual chaotic dog into the real world. Interact with a funny 3D dog through your camera, control its movements, and make
suggested_competitors.difference_from_target_app: Similar concept of placing a chaotic virtual dog in surroundings and controlling its actions.

suggested_competitors.title: AR Dogy: Funny Dog Filter
suggested_competitors.why_relevant: AR dog placement in environment, record meme videos, funny pranks, very close name overlap.
suggested_competitors.short_description: Enjoy funny meme pranks with virtual dogs! Spawn a 3D dog in your space and record AR camera videos.
suggested_competitors.desc200: AR Dogy: Funny Dog Filter lets you place a realistic mischievous dog in your surroundings. Create hilarious prank videos, customize dog animations, and add popular sound effects for social media
suggested_competitors.difference_from_target_app: Very close name cloning; focuses on simple dog placement and quick pranks.

suggested_competitors.title: AR Dogy - Funny Filter Meme
suggested_competitors.why_relevant: AR meme character placement in environment, record prank videos, save and manage created clips.
suggested_competitors.short_description: Place trending meme characters and virtual dog filters in your room to record funny prank videos.
suggested_competitors.desc200: AR Dogy - Funny Filter Meme brings your favorite internet memes to life! Use real-time AR camera tracking to place dogs and characters in your room, add custom music, and record funny prank videos
suggested_competitors.difference_from_target_app: Direct thematic match focusing on meme characters and video recording.

suggested_competitors.title: AR Dogy: Funny Meme Filter
suggested_competitors.why_relevant: AR dog filter with interactive tap-to-trigger character animations, movement, and actions.
suggested_competitors.short_description: Create viral video clips with interactive AR dog filter animations, character movement, and funny meme effects.
suggested_competitors.desc200: AR Dogy: Funny Meme Filter is the ultimate AR camera app for dog lovers and content creators. Place an animated virtual dog in your real space, tap to trigger funny movements, and record prank
suggested_competitors.difference_from_target_app: Strong focus on interactive tap actions and dog animations; target app offers broader 3D character control and dance scenes.

suggested_competitors.title: Fazee - Funny Face Filter
suggested_competitors.why_relevant: Funny face filters, animal filters, face distortions, time warp, trend/video sharing intent.
suggested_competitors.short_description: Try funny face filters, real-time face distortions, popular time warp scans, and funny camera pranks.
suggested_competitors.desc200: Fazee - Funny Face Filter is your go-to app for creating hilarious camera distortions and warp effects. Use the trending time warp scan line, morph your facial features, try funny animal masks,
suggested_competitors.difference_from_target_app: Fazee is more face-warp/time-warp oriented; target app is more AR Dogy and 3D AR character oriented.

content_direction.recommended_store_message: Make AR short videos more playful with AR Dogy characters, interactive 3D actions, dance scenes, and weird face effects.
recommended_screenshot_angles: Place AR Dogy in your real scene
Control character actions: run, jump, move
Record short videos for social sharing
recommended_localization_notes: Keep Dogy as a branded/product term if it appears in the app name.
Translate user intent naturally: funny video, face filter, weird effect, dance, short video, AR character.
Do not over-translate FYP if the local market commonly uses FYP/TikTok-style wording.
In markets where 'dogy' looks like a typo, support it with dog/puppy semantic keywords in keyword fields.

pipeline_usage_notes.recommended_next_step: Run keyword extraction using weighted clusters instead of treating Snapchat/TikTok/Instagram as direct competitors.
